'''Shistavanen''' language was the native language of the [[Shistavanen/Legends|Shistavanen]] species from [[Uvena Prime/Legends|Uvena Prime]]. The language mainly consisted of growls and barks.<ref name="u">''[[Ultimate Alien Anthology]]''</ref>

Since the time of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], most Shistavanen were fluent in both Shistavanen and [[Galactic Basic Standard/Legends|Basic]], although they were only literate in their own language.<ref name="u" />

==Notable non-native speakers of Shistavanen==
*[[Noa Briqualon]]<ref name="g">[[Star Wars Gamer 9|''Star Wars Gamer'' 9]]</ref>
*[[Dreddon]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]]<ref name="h">{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/article/sw20031120hutt|text=Hutt! Hutt! Hutt! #6}}</ref>
